questions.title: Quadratic roots
questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.prompt: Which of the following are roots of $x^2 - 5x + 6 = 0$?

questions.title: Final velocity
questions.subject: Physics
questions.prompt: A car accelerates from rest at $2\ \text{m/s}^2$ for $5\ \text{s}$. What is its final velocity?

questions.title: Prime numbers
questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.prompt: Select all prime numbers from the list below.
questions.answer: 11 and 17 have no divisors other than 1 and themselves. 9 = 3×3 and 15 = 3×5.

questions.title: Circuit diagram (image example)
questions.subject: Physics
questions.prompt: For the circuit shown, find the total current drawn from the battery.
questions.answer: Total resistance is 6 Ω across 12 V, so $I = V/R = 12/6 = 2\ \text{A}$.
